attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BATCH_ID,
ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
ACCOUNT_CLASS,
ACCOUNT_CODE,
ACCTD_AMOUNT,
ADJUSTMENT_ID,
ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
AMOUNT,
BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
COGS_PERCENT,
COMMENTS,
CONTEXT,
CREATED_BY,
CREATION_DATE,
CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
EXTRACT_TYPE,
FISCAL_ID,
FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
GES_UPDATE_DATE,
GLOBAL_NAME,
GL_DATE,
GL_POSTED_DATE,
GROUPING_ID,
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
INVOICE_PERCENT,
INVOICING_RULE_ID,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
LINE_SEQ_ID,
LINE_TYPE,
LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
ORDER_HEADER_ID,
ORDER_LINE_ID,
ORDER_NUMBER,
ORG_ID,
LINE_PERCENT,
PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
QUOTA_FLAG,
REASON_CODE,
REBATE_AMOUNT,
REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
REQUEST_ID,
RULE_START_DATE,
SALESREP_ID,
SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
SOURCE_TYPE,
SPLIT_PERCENT,
TERRITORY_ID,
TRANSACTION_DATE,
TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER ( ORDER BY NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY )+COALESCE(MT_DRVD.MAX_KEY,0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
TRX_DATE,
TRX_NAME,
TRX_NUMBER,
TRX_TYPE,
UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
DV_TRANSACTION_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     ,
SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
-999 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT, 
'N' AS XAAS_OA_FLAG ,
SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
-7777 AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
CAST (-999 AS INTEGER ) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
DV_TRANSACTION_KEY AS ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
'=' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG  ,
'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_DATA_KEY5,
'N' AS TSV_FLAG,
'N' AS MERAKI_FLAG   
FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_SWSS_TRX_CG NCR 
INNER JOIN 
 ( SEL MAX(MT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT) AS MAX_KEY      FROM
         (
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX
    UNION ALL 	
    SELECT MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID )    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_P
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID )    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_P
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RA_P
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RT_P
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RAE_P 
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID )    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_CG
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID )    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_CG
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT_CG
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_CG 
    /* Satchinn: added as a part of Lot-2B CG1 implementation  */   
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_CG   
    /* CCSP VIP Changes*/
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_CSPP_VIP_CG   
    /*Added RTE Exception tables */
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_RT  
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT  
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT 
    UNION ALL /* BBALIVAD added as part of SAAS implementation */
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_OA_S  /*bookings*/
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_OA_S /*bookings*/
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_OA_S   /*revenue*/
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_OM  /*bookings*/
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_OM /*bookings*/
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT_OA_OM   /*revenue*/
    UNION ALL   /* Added as part of Accruals Q2FY19 */ 
    SELECT MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NET_CHG_REV_ACRL_XAAS 
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_ACRL_TRX_CG
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_ACRL_TRX_CG
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_ACRL_TRX_CG
    UNION ALL   /* Added as part of Meraki Q2FY19 */ 
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_MERK_TRX_CG
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_MERK_TRX_CG
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_MERK_TRX_CG
    UNION ALL SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_MERK_CG /*carbt*/
    UNION ALL SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_MERK_CG  /*carbt*/
    UNION ALL /*RAO CHANGES*/
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO
	UNION ALL 
	SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_SWSS_CG
	/* As part of Net Accounting*/
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_NA_P
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG
	UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_CSPP_VIP_ADJ_MERGE_CG	/*SWSS CHANGES*/
 UNION all
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0)AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM EXCEPDB_DV3.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_ACRL_CG            /*Flexi Invoice */
UNION all
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM STGDB_DV3.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_ACRL_TRX_CG            /*Flexi Invoice */
UNION ALL
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM EXCEPDB_DV3.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_ACRL_CG          /*Flexi Invoice */
UNION ALL
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM STGDB_DV3.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_FOR_bkg_acrl_CG    /*Flexi Invoice */         
		 )MT
    ) MT_DRVD    ON 1=1
